Programmes

Supporting people beyond our projects

Outside of our project work, we support the people and communities around it — from emerging planning and design professionals to local events and partnerships.

Mentorship

Supporting emerging planning and design professionals.

CSI & community

Sponsorships, presentations and participation in the communities we work in.
Mentorship

Supporting emerging
planning & design talent

We support the development of emerging planning and design professionals, including through our sponsorship of the Ba Isago University Landscape Architecture Awards in 2023 and 2024.

We don't yet have a formal, structured mentorship programme in place. If you're a student or emerging professional interested in town planning, urban design or related fields, we'd welcome you to get in touch to learn more about how we might support you.

Get in touch
CSI & community

Investing in the
communities we work in

Alongside our project work, we take part in community events, sponsorships and presentations across the areas we operate in. The activities below are drawn directly from our recent record.

  1. 01Gakgatla Farm Presentation
  2. 02Nhabe Table Tennis Open Tournament
  3. 03Nhabe Table Tennis kit sponsorship
  4. 04Ba Isago University Awards
  5. 05Housing Pitso

Gakgatla Farm Presentation, 2026

A presentation on farm development, land-use planning, and the planning laws affecting agriculture.

Nhabe Table Tennis Open Tournament, February 2026

Sponsorship of the open tournament.

Nhabe Table Tennis kit sponsorship, January 2026

Sponsorship of team kit.

Ba Isago University Landscape Architecture Awards, 2023 & 2024

Sponsorship of the awards in both years.

Housing Pitso, 2023

Participation under the theme "Affordable and Sustainable Housing for All: A Collaborative Approach with Private Sector."

Get in touch

Want to learn more or get involved?

Whether you're a student, a community partner, or just curious about our mentorship or CSI activity, contact us and we'll share more information.
